overall.description: First-person exploration of a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night, featuring neon-lit underpasses, holographic advertisements, and futuristic architecture. The footage appears to be from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), with the camera walking along wet sidewalks beneath towering skyscrapers and ascending illuminated staircases to an upper plaza with giant holographic fish displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian walkway under urban overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath the overpass, observing the shifting neon colors on the wall panels

entered.detail: vertical light panels cycling through pink, green, yellow, and blue colors
concrete bridge overhead with yellow and black striped safety markings
black lamppost with green digital display wrapped around the base
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting neon lights
tall buildings covered with illuminated advertisements and digital screens
multi-lane street with motion-blurred vehicle headlights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, with the camera walking along a sidewalk beneath a massive overpass. Colorful neon wall panels cycle through vibrant hues on the right, while blurred traffic passes on the left. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding lights, and towering skyscrapers with digital billboards rise in the distance.

events.description: passes from open sidewalk into covered area with concrete barriers and graffiti

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past concrete barriers toward the stairwell entrance under the overpass

entered.detail: tall concrete blocks with posters and graffiti separating walkway from road
dark opening leading to stairs ascending to upper level
orange LED chevron arrows mounted on the wall indicating direction
underside of concrete bridge structure overhead

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper under the overpass, the camera passes concrete barriers with graffiti on the left while approaching a stairwell entrance. The neon wall panels recede into the distance on the right, and orange digital arrow signs appear on the wall. The environment becomes more enclosed as the walkway leads toward the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell with perforated metal railings

events.description: enters enclosed stairwell and begins ascending concrete stairs
emerges from stairwell into open plaza with holographic displays visible

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs with illuminated perforated railings, emerging to the upper plaza level

entered.detail: wide flight of concrete steps ascending to upper level
metal balustrade with circular perforations and integrated orange lighting
large glowing blue holographic koi fish swimming in the air
elevated open area with wet concrete flooring and surrounding architecture
modern building exterior with illuminated windows and signage
secondary staircase with blue neon edge lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a concrete stairwell and ascends the steps, passing perforated metal railings with orange accent lighting. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens into an upper plaza where a massive blue holographic fish swims in the night sky. The area features wet reflective surfaces and additional illuminated staircases leading higher.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban plaza with holographic displays and neon staircases

events.description: large gold holographic fish swims overhead, illuminating the plaza with orange light

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza and ascending additional stairs while observing the giant holographic fish displays

entered.detail: massive glowing orange-gold holographic fish with flowing fins swimming overhead
rectangular planters with tropical plants and blue neon accent lighting
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings with blue lighting underneath
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: Exploring the upper plaza, the camera reveals a stunning view of two giant holographic fish—one gold and one blue—swimming through the air between skyscrapers. The area features multiple levels of illuminated staircases with blue neon edging, planter boxes with tropical vegetation, and connecting overhead walkways. The wet surfaces continue to reflect the vibrant neon atmosphere of the cyberpunk city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked street level beneath a massive overpass up into a luminous high-altitude plaza. It begins by walking along a wet sidewalk where colorful neon wall panels cycle through vibrant hues and towering skyscrapers loom in the distance. As the camera moves deeper under the overpass, the space becomes more enclosed, passing graffiti-covered concrete barriers and orange digital signs before turning toward a stairwell. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends concrete steps with orange accent lighting, finally emerging onto an upper plaza where the horizon opens to reveal a massive blue holographic fish swimming through the night sky. The movement concludes by exploring this multi-leveled terrace, where gold and blue holographic fish glide between skyscrapers above reflective surfaces, tropical vegetation, and neon-edged walkways.
